name: MEDICINOVA INC
business: MediciNova is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics for serious diseases with unmet medical needs, with a commercial focus on the United States market. Its current development activities are centered on MN-166 (ibudilast) for neurological disorders and MN-001 (tipelukast) for fibrotic and metabolic disorders. The company expects to incur substantial net losses as it continues development.
namedCustomers: Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics for the treatment of serious diseases with unmet medical needs and a commercial focus on the United States market.
